label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked with 600m remaining on 20% ramps in Valdepeñas, gapped MAS and LÓPEZ despite their late-race acceleration to take stage and bonuses.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ used KUSS as leadout wheel before final 600m, revealing continued Jumbo depth despite earlier crash concerns.
MAS attacked first on steep ramps but lacked punch to hold ROGLIČ, suggesting explosive power deficit on 20%+ gradients.
VAN BAARLE pulled until flamme rouge for ROGLIČ on steep finale, demonstrating Jumbo commits domestiques fully even on punchy climbs.
CORT Magnus solo lasted until 600m remaining despite 16km breakaway, showing five-man break size optimal for rolling terrain control.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: attacked after teammate leadout within 600m on 20% gradient, gapped entire field for second stage win despite stage 10 crash
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: initiated attack on steep ramps but couldn't hold ROGLIČ acceleration, suggests adequate positioning but inadequate explosive power
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: third place with teammate MAS second indicates Movistar double threat on punchy finales worked numerically
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: fourth place on steep punchy finish shows climbing form improving, now viable GC threat at 1:17 overall
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: provided leadout wheel for ROGLIČ on steep finale despite stage 10 workload, confirms continued domestique strength
rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: positive: pulled to flamme rouge on steep punchy climb for ROGLIČ, unusual domestique work on gradient suggests exceptional climbing form
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: neutral: 16km solo attempt held 30 seconds into final km before 20% ramps, confirms time trial strength insufficient on extreme gradients
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: neutral: maintains red jersey but lost same time to ROGLIČ as GUILLAUME, confirming survival mode rather than contention
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: eighth at 11 seconds shows top-10 GC positioning intact despite punchy finale not ideal terrain
rider_signals.GROßSCHARTNER Felix: positive: tenth overall confirms GC form despite Bora team focus elsewhere, potential podium dark horse
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: neutral: stole KOM points on category 2 climb before finale, tactical awareness to secure classification lead separate from GC
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: attacked from 13th overall on penultimate climb but absorbed quickly, confirming UAE lacks depth beyond stage hunting
